template_notes.purpose: Structured requirement source for path partition, system blueprint, module contracts, RTL trace, and UVM trace.
authoring_rules: Keep ids stable once used by path partition, system blueprint, or module contracts.
Prefer rtl_targets at feature level so module contracts can be scaffolded before RTL exists.
Keep verification_targets aligned with TB or UVM ownership.
Use source_refs to point back to normalized spec or parsed sections.
